name: Pirates Pies (Festival)
recipeInstructions:
- Dough: Sift flour; cut shortening into flour. Mix egg and milk together. Add to shortening/flour mixture. Stir to form a dough. Form dough into a ball.
- Roll the dough about 1/3 at a time on a lightly floured board. Cut dough in 5 1/2 inch diameter circles (or squares).
- Place two heaping tablespoons of filling on each dough circle.
- Dampen edges of dough circles.
- Fold over meat. Crimp edges with a fork.
- Prick with a fork at the top.
- Deep fry until golden brown, 350 degrees F.
DOUGH:
5 1/2 c Self-rising flour
2/3 c Shortening
2 Eggs, beaten
1 3/4 c Milk
8 c Vegetable oil
